ocr_findings.description: Section heading: image reads 'ベネトレーションテスト' (ペネトレーション is standard spelling); OCR renders 'ベネトレーションテスト' — consistent with image text, possible source typo but OCR is faithful to image.

Image top section shows a labeled diagram 'WPA2が暗号化する範囲、HTTPSが暗号化する範囲' with two figures (img-0 and img-1); OCR includes placeholders for both images and the caption text. However, the 試験にはコしが出る！ box text in OCR reads 'つし' instead of the stylized 'コし' logo — minor rendering difference, content of box is fully captured.
OCR includes 'マイピース' on a standalone line before VPN definition — this appears to be a misread of a small mascot/icon label in the image margin. Not present as meaningful text in image body.

reviewer_notes: Page covers VPN, ペネトレーションテスト, and ワンタイムパスワード with WPA2/HTTPS diagram at top. All three definitions are faithfully reproduced. The spurious 'マイピース' insertion and icon rendering differences are low-impact. One med-severity finding for the caption/image area but no meaningful text is lost.
